WelcomePage.welcome_title: Welcome to AI Full Stack Course Calm
WelcomePage.about_text: This project centers on an application for recording, analyzing, and interacting with therapy sessions.
WelcomePage.patient_interface_text: Converse with the AI therapist and review previous session logs.
WelcomePage.therapist_interface_text: Upload recorded sessions, view transcriptions, summaries, and analytics.
WelcomePage.front_end_text: Create an interface for uploading and managing therapy session recordings.
WelcomePage.back_end_text: Integrate the speech-to-text engine and develop APIs for transcription.
WelcomePage.database_text: Design schemas for storing audio files, transcripts, and metadata.
WelcomePage.business_logic_text: Orchestrate the flow from audio ingestion to transcript generation.
WelcomePage.feature1_text: Get started in minutes with our intuitive platform.
WelcomePage.testimonial1: This platform transformed our business operations!
WelcomePage.testimonial2: The best solution we've ever implemented.
WelcomePage.footer_text: Join 1,000+ companies already using our platform.

Home.getStarted: Let's get started with your recordings!
Home.startRecordingDesc: Begin a new recording session with high-quality audio capture
Home.dashboardDesc: View your analytics, statistics, and recording history

record.recordingInstructions: Press the microphone button to start recording.
